denominator_note: The 24 nodes are the Minimal Relativity DAG constructed for THIS closure exercise (the coarse-grained observer/geometry/boundary node set shown in ROOT_DAG_MASTER.md). The percentages below are of THIS 24-node DAG only -- not of 'all of relativity', not of 'all textbook formulas', and not a claim about coverage of the real theory of relativity.

status_taxonomy.note: Per founder, 2026-07-21. Applies to the causal-quantum-gravity Coq upgrades folded in from PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md -- a QUALITY overlay on top of the existing closed/partial/open node statuses above, not a new status column that changes the 19/24 count.

status_taxonomy.yellow: theorem closed but the physical/semantic bridge is partial -- FORMAL-CLOSED / BRIDGE-PARTIAL.

distinct_not_node8: InfoTelegraphHorizonUnification_attempt.v (with InfoTelegraphCrossover_attempt.v) is verified green, but it proves the spine's OWN classical/quantum crossover discriminant lambda_c=D^2/4MK -- a DISTINCT object from node-8 (OB-07 / GC-01..GC-05 observer-normalization/redshift/lapse). lift.note: Lift chain on this same 24-node DAG: 16.7% (pre-closure baseline) -> 70.8% (v0.1, RD-neutrality gate + living-geometry finite-matrix witnesses) -> 79.2% (v0.2, Null-Transport Factorization Gate + Geometry Stationarity Gate close OB-07 and OC-05). Weighted: 81.25% (v0.1) -> 89.6% (v0.2).

new_gates_v0_2.description: Diagonal observer map B=diag(a,b) factors uniquely as B=N*diag(chi^-1,chi), N=sqrt(det B) (internal LAPSE), chi=sqrt(b/a) (relative-observer factor). Pure observer change => det B=1 => N=1. Redshift = relative retained-step rate (nu_o=N nu_i). Composition is multiplicative in N (scalar holonomy). Horizon = N=0 <=> det B=0, a finite rank-loss boundary, not infinity. Unruh-fix readout kappa_R=Normalize_N(a_local) repairs the internal bridge to Schwarzschild/Unruh without asserting physical surface gravity.

The living-geometry state Theta obeys the same DRL retained-action grammar as the rest of the root: S_closed = S_DRL + retained-difference cost of Theta. Geometry source S_Theta^a = Phi^T G_a Psi (reader x record changing the operator geometry reads). Stationarity gives an explicit stepper for Theta_{n+1}. Exact fixture (Theta_n=1/2,Theta_{n-1}=0,M_Theta=2,K=1,dt=1,U_Theta=Theta^2/4,G_1=[[0,1],[1,0]],Phi_n=[1,0],Psi_n=[0,1]) gives S_Theta=1, Theta_{n+1}=3/8, action residual R_Theta=0. A failing control (S_Theta forced to 0) gives Theta_wrong=7/8 and, evaluated against the TRUE equation, R_Theta=1 != 0 -- proving the record field Psi is load-bearing, not a hand-picked always-succeeding recurrence.

remaining_bottlenecks_for_real_physics_t.description: The graph front-speed v is still only DECLARED (not derived or calibrated) as playing the role of the physical speed of light c. No encoding from root units to SI units exists.
Retention memory is still only DECLARED as playing a mass-like role; no mass-energy law is derived from the root.
r_s=2GE/c^4 remains a [DeclaredFormula] calculator identity, not a theorem derived from the root; still gated as real-physics-calibration work, unaffected by the v0.2 internal-bridge repair.

tau_c=pi*c/a remains a [DeclaredFormula] calculator identity, not a theorem derived from the root. The v0.2 Unruh-fix readout kappa_R=Normalize_N(a_local) repairs the INTERNAL bridge to OB-07/OC-05 only -- it does not promote OC-04 itself to derived or to real physical surface gravity.
Full basis-independent covariance under the minimal closed state Z_n is still only partially closed; carried forward unchanged from v0.1.

roadmap_note: v0.1's two OPEN bottlenecks (OB-07, OC-05) are both CLOSED in v0.2 by two new FINITE INTERNAL CLOSURE gates (algebraic, not real physics, not Coq) -- see new_gates_v0_2 above. What remains open toward any 'heavy GR' / real-physics tier is exactly the five items in remaining_bottlenecks_for_real_physics_tier: they are calibration gaps (v=c, mass-energy, Schwarzschild/Unruh-as-derived, full basis covariance), not missing internal algebra. Neither the v0.1 nor the v0.2 gates may be closed further by importing a named external law (e.g. a named metric, the Einstein field equations, or a named redshift formula) as a premise -- doing so would trip DRIFT_CONTRACT.json's hard_fail_conditions.
